parsed.production_notes: The video uses human-recorded footage for the job applicant and interviewer characters. However, the AI tutor character is a static, professionally shot photograph with a synthesized voiceover, which is a common mixed-media approach for app advertisements.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a medium build and a brown complexion. She has dark brown, shoulder-length hair tied back in a low ponytail. Her face is oval-shaped with dark eyes and distinct eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: A short-sleeved, collared black polo shirt and light-wash blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially dejected and sad, she becomes progressively more engaged, hopeful, and happy as the conversation with the tutor continues.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian man in his early 20s with a slim build and a brown complexion. He has short, curly black hair, wears black-rimmed glasses, and has a light mustache. His features are sharp.
characters.wardrobe: A light-colored, possibly off-white, button-up shirt.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, wavy, dark brown hair styled over one shoulder. She has a small red bindi on her forehead and a warm, friendly smile.
characters.wardrobe: A bright pink sleeveless blouse and a matching sheer pink saree with a thin gold border.

scenes.setting: An office reception area. A large black wall panel with a logo ('Juniper') and a clock is behind the desk. The desk is black and white, with a small vase of yellow flowers.

panels.panel_visual_description: In an office reception area, Character B, a young man with glasses, sits behind a desk looking up and speaking to Character A, a young woman standing opposite him. Character A stands with her hands clasped, looking downcast and disappointed. The lighting is standard office lighting. The shot is a medium profile view of their interaction.

scenes.visual_description: A medium shot in an office reception area. A young man (Character B) behind a desk dismisses a young woman (Character A) who is standing in front of him. She looks dejected. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen corresponding to the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಬರಲ್ವಾ? ಕೆಲಸ ಬೇಕಾ ನಿಮಗೆ? ಇಲ್ಲೆಲ್ಲಾ ನಿಮ್ಮಂತೋರ್ಗೆ ಕೆಲಸ ಇಲ್ಲ. [You don't know English? You want a job? There's no job for people like you here.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
English baralwa?
Kelasa bekaa ningo?
Illella nimmanthorge kelasa illa.

scenes.setting: The bottom panel shows a modern apartment living room with a teal-colored couch, cushions, and a window in the background. The top panel is a neutral white studio background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A static, studio headshot of Character C, a smiling young woman in a pink saree, is shown against a plain white background. She is framed from the chest up, looking directly at the camera with a pleasant and inviting expression. The lighting is bright and even.

Character A sits on a teal couch in her living room, holding a smartphone and looking at it. She initially looks sad and slumps slightly, but as the scene progresses, she sits up, becomes more engaged, and eventually smiles. She is framed from the waist up. Natural light comes from a window behind her.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen view. The top panel shows a static image of the AI tutor (Character C) against a white background. The bottom panel shows the user (Character A) sitting on her couch at home, interacting with her phone. Subtitles appear in an orange box over the respective panels as each character speaks. Character A's demeanor changes from sad to happy throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: ಇಷ್ಟು ದುಃಖವಾಗಿದ್ದು ಯಾಕೆ? [Why are you so sad?]
Character A says: ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಸತಿ ಕ್ವಾಲಿಫೈ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ, ಕೆಲಸ ಕೂಡ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಬರುತ್ತೆ. ಆದ್ರೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಂದ ಯಾವಾಗಲೂ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ. [Every time I qualify, I know the work well too. But because of English, I always get rejected.]
Character C says: ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ ಕಾಮನ್ ಆಗಿದೆ ಮತ್ತು ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಇದನ್ನ ಫಿಕ್ಸ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಇಂದು ನಾವು ಇಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡೋಣ. [This is very common and with practice, it can be fixed. Today, let's start from here.]
Character A says: ಓಕೆ. [Okay.]
Character C says: ನಿಮ್ಮ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ನನಗೆ ಹೇಳಿ. [Tell me about yourself.]
Character A says: ನನ್ ಹೆಸರು ಪ್ರಿಯಾ. ನನಗೆ ಮೂರು ವರ್ಷದ ಎಕ್ಸ್ಪೀರಿಯನ್ಸ್ ಇದೆ ಕಸ್ಟಮರ್ ಹ್ಯಾಂಡ್ಲಿಂಗ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ. ಹಾರ್ಡ್ ವರ್ಕಿಂಗ್ ಕೂಡ ಇದೀನಿ. [My name is Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling. I am also hardworking.]
Character C says: ಇದನ್ನ ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳಿ, I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person. [Say it like this, I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person.]
Character A says: Wow! ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ ಈಸೀ ಇತ್ತು. [Wow! That was very easy.]
Character C says: ನಾನು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೊತೆಗೆ ಇಪ್ಪತ್ತನಾಲ್ಕು ಗಂಟೆ ಅವೈಲಬಲ್ ಇರ್ತೀನಿ. ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದ್ರೂ fifteen minutes ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಸಾಕು. [I am available with you 24 hours. Practicing for fifteen minutes whenever you want is enough.]
Character A says: ನಾನ್ ಎಷ್ಟು ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋ ತರ ಆಗ್ತೀನಿ? [In how many days will I be able to speak English well?]
Character C says: ಕೇವಲ ಇಪ್ಪತ್ತು ದಿನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ. ನೀವು ನನಗೆ ಯಾವುದೇ ಕ್ವೆಶ್ಚನ್ ಕೇಳಿ. ನಾನು ನಿಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಆನ್ಸರ್ ಕೊಡೋದನ್ನು ಕಲಿಸುತ್ತೇನೆ ಮತ್ತು ತಪ್ಪುಗಳನ್ನ ರಿಯಲ್ ಟೀಚರ್ ತರ ಕರೆಕ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Just practice with me for 20 days. You can ask me any question. I will teach you how to answer in English and correct your mistakes like a real teacher.]
Character A says: ಹೌದಾ? ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದೆಲ್ಲಾ ಕೇಳಿ ದುಬಾರಿ ಇದೆ ಅನ್ನಿಸ್ತಿದೆ. [Really? But hearing all this, it seems expensive.]
Character C says: ಬಿಲ್ಕುಲ್ ಇಲ್ಲ, ಸಿರ್ಫ್ 2 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಪರ್ ಡೇ ಅಲ್ಲಿ 7 ದಿನಗಳ ಟ್ರಯಲ್ ತಗೋಬಹುದು. [Not at all, you can take a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees per day.]
Character A says: ಹೌದಾ? ನಾನ್ ಈಗಲೇ SpeakX ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ. [Really? I will download the SpeakX app right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Ishtu dukhavagiddu yaake?
Ella sati qualify maadtini,
kelasa kooda chennag barutte.
Aadre English inda
yaavaglu reject aagtini.
Idu tumba common aagide
mattu practice maadidre
idanna fix maadbahudu.
Ivattu naavu illinda
shuru maadona.

Nimma bagge nanage heli.
Nan hesaru Priya.
Nanage mooru varshada
experience ide customer

scenes.setting: A graphic user interface against a plain white background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A centered, front-facing view of a smartphone screen mockup. The screen displays a clean, white user interface with orange accents. There are icons and text describing app features, such as 'Learn with Personal AI Mentor', 'Unlock Unlimited Exercises', '100+ Real Life Scenarios', and 'Get Personalised Feedback'.

scenes.visual_description: An end card showing a smartphone with the SpeakX app interface. The screen lists features like 'Personal AI Mentor' and '100+ Real Life Scenarios'. At the top, it says 'Download SpeakX App'. At the bottom, an orange button with a countdown timer says 'Start 7 Days Trial Now'.
